option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Country List</string> <string name="country_name_1">RDC</string> <string name="country_capital_1">Kinshasa</string> <string name="country_description_1">The Democratic Republic of the Congo is a country in Central Africa.</string> <string name="country_description_2">France is a country in Western Europe.</string> <string name="country_description_3">Canada is a country in North America.</string> <string name="country_description_4">Japan is a country in East Asia.</string> <string name="country_description_5">Italy is a country in Southern Europe.</string> <string name="country_description_6">Brazil is a country in South America.</string> <string name="country_description_7">Morocco is a country in North Africa.</string> <string name="country_description_8">Germany is a country in Central Europe.</string> <string name="country_description_9">Argentina is a country in South America.</string> <string name="country_description_10">India is a country in South Asia.</string> </resources>
